headline: Waters Prices Offering of Senior Notes
summary: Waters Corporation (NYSE: WAT) (the "Company" or "Waters") today announced that it has priced an offering (the "Offering") of $3.5 billion aggregate principal amount of the following senior notes issued by its subsidiary, Augusta SpinCo Corporation ("Augusta"):
